docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY PINTER MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG THEODORE CHUNG JEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
